whyUs.responseDesc: A dedicated lead clarifies scope and timeline quickly after inquiry.
whyUs.deliveryDesc: Drafts, work-in-progress, and final delivery are shared without long waiting gaps.

process.step1Desc: 30–60 min chat or video to clarify scope, budget, and timeline
process.step2Desc: Detailed proposal with scope, deliverables, timeline, and price
process.step3Desc: Stage-by-stage updates with real-time feedback loops
process.step4Desc: Ops guide video + docs + 14-day free support

faq.a1: Simple landing pages usually take 1-2 days, and standard websites 3-5 days. Same-day rush work is available by agreement (+30-70%). If the confirmed delivery date is missed, a 10% credit is applied.
faq.q2: Does fast delivery mean lower quality?
faq.a2: Repeatable production flows are systemized, while project-specific time goes into the screens, message, and inquiry path that matter most. That keeps delivery fast without sacrificing the customer-facing result.
faq.a3: Based on scope, design level, timeline, and ops support. Free consultation first, then a transparent proposal. Any out-of-scope cost is confirmed before work starts.
faq.q4: Is the English version the same price?
faq.a4: Base price is for Korean. Extra languages are +₩20,000 per language.
faq.a5: Basic revisions are available for 14 days after handoff within the agreed scope. If the confirmed delivery date is missed, a 10% credit is applied, and any added scope is confirmed before work begins.
faq.a6: Same price. Platform secure payment and reviews are available, and direct email inquiry is also welcome.

contact.responsePromise: Temp reply in 1h · Full quote in 24h
contact.success: Inquiry received. We will get back to you shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please email directly.

about.title: About
about.name: Jaehong Jung
about.bio: AIO works like an integrated production team across consultation, planning, design, development, and operations. We focus on fast response, clear quotes, result-based portfolio proof, and reliable maintenance after delivery.

footer.tagline: Ship in 5 days max · Fair pricing, speed first
